channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: politics
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: politics

item.title: Conservative senator lays out proposals for post-McConnell reforms
item.description: Sen. Mike Lee (R-Utah), the chairman of the conservative Senate Steering Committee, has laid out a list of proposed reforms designed to ensure that the next Senate Republican leader does not have the same power as outgoing Senate GOP Leader Mitch McConnell (Ky.).
item.dc:creator: Alexander Bolton, NewsNation

item.title: DeSantis pushes back on 'delusional' Harris remark about Hurricane Milton calls
item.description: Florida Gov. Ron DeSantis (R) said Monday that it was “delusional” for Vice President Kamala Harris to accuse him of “political gamesmanship” after reports emerged that he did not take the Democratic presidential nominee’s calls as his state braces for Hurricane Milton.
item.dc:creator: Sarah Fortinsky, Fox 5

item.title: Trump spoke to Putin as many as 7 times since leaving office, Bob Woodward reports in new book
item.description: Bob Woodward writes in his new book “War” that Donald Trump has had as many as seven private phone calls with Vladimir Putin since leaving office and that he secretly sent the Russian president COVID-19 test machines in 2020.
item.dc:creator: Michelle L. Price And Meg Kinnard, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Hispanic voters rail against 'dishonest' Biden-Harris border record as poll shows Trump gaining in key states
item.description: Hispanic Trump supporters who spoke to Fox News Digital in Nevada railed against Biden-Harris border policies and said Hispanic voters are moving toward Trump.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: PA gov takes victory lap after Supreme Court rejects GOP bid to overturn election law ‘usurpations’
item.description: The U.S. Supreme Court rejected hearing a GOP-backed challenge from lawmakers in Pennsylvania regarding an election executive order signed by President Biden in 2021.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Oregon mistakenly registered hundreds more voters without proving citizenship
item.description: Authorities in Oregon have announced they have identified a further 302 people on the state’s voter rolls who didn’t provide proof of citizenship when they were registered to vote.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Cruz opponent Allred raises $30 million in 3 months
item.description: Rep. Colin Allred (D) announced Tuesday that he has raised more than $30 million over the past three months in his battle against Sen. Ted Cruz (R), reflecting broad desire among Democratic donors to defeat one of the Senate’s most prominent conservatives.
item.dc:creator: Alexander Bolton, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Biden postpones trip to Germany and Angola to monitor Hurricane Milton
item.description: President Joe Biden is postponing a planned trip to Germany and Angola to stay at the White House to monitor Hurricane Milton, which is bearing down on Florida’s Gulf Coast.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Harris slips in national survey, now leads Trump by 3 points
item.description: Vice President Harris has slipped slightly in new Reuters/Ipsos polling, now leading former President Trump among registered voters by a slim 3-point margin as Election Day draws closer.
item.dc:creator: Julia Mueller, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Moreno looks to close the gap on Sherrod Brown in Ohio
item.description: Bernie Moreno and Republicans are attempting to narrow the gap against Sen. Sherrod Brown (D) in Ohio as they try to nab one of the most contested races in the country in a battle for the Senate majority.
item.dc:creator: Al Weaver, NewsNation

item.title: GOP lawmaker unveils effort to ban illegal immigrants from using IDs to buy guns
item.description: A new House GOP bill would ban the sale of firearms to people in the U.S. illegally even if they have a government ID.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: 3 Laredo city councilmembers object to pay raise council voted for itself
item.description: A trio of city councilmembers from the border city of Laredo are upset over a recent vote by the council to increase council pay by 40%.
item.dc:creator: Sandra Sanchez, NewsNation

item.title: Harris takes slim lead over Trump in new poll as voters view her as candidate of change
item.description: Vice President Harris took a small lead over former President Trump in a new national poll released on Tuesday as voters increasingly see her as the candidate of change.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: First on Fox: Top outside group backing House Republicans sets fundraising record
item.description: The leading outside group that supports House Republicans is reporting its highest fundraising quarter ever, as the GOP aims to hold and potentially expand its razor thin majority in Congress.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Vulnerable Dem Jon Tester turns on Biden admin over DEI after Montana universities stripped of federal funds
item.description: Tester took aim at Biden and the Department of Education for denying federal funding to Montana universities based on failure to meet DEI standards.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Your guide to voting in Minnesota: Registration, absentee ballots and general election details
item.description: We are less than a month out from Election Day. Here are answers to some frequently asked questions MPR News readers asked us about the upcoming election.
item.dc:creator: Anika Besst and Nicole Johnson, MPR News

item.title: 1 year after Hezbollah strikes, Israel reinforces troops and questions mount over ‘limited’ operation
item.description: Questions are mounting over Israel's "limited" operation in Lebanon as it reinforces its troops over the border and security experts warn Israel is re-strategizing its fight against Hezbollah.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Poll: In the midst of a tight presidential race, Trump draws support from voters disillusioned with democracy
item.description: New polling shows this year’s Harris v. Trump presidential race is too close to call, with Trump drawing support from voters who are disillusioned with democracy. Results from the McCourtney Institute for Democracy’s Sept. 23-27, 2024 Mood of the Nation Poll.
item.dc:creator: Eric Plutzer and Craig Helmstetter, MPR News

item.title: Harris and Trump mark somber anniversary of Hamas’ Oct. 7 attack on Israel
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — Former President Donald Trump and Vice President Kamala Harris marked the anniversary of the deadliest attack on Jews since the Holocaust as the presidential candidates approach the final weeks of the campaign during a widening conflict in the Middle East.
item.dc:creator: ADRIANA GOMEZ LICON, COLLEEN LONG and CHRIS MEGERIAN, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Supreme Court declines Biden's appeal in Texas emergency abortion case
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — A court order that says hospitals cannot federally be required to provide pregnancy terminations when they violate a Texas abortion ban will stay for now, the Supreme Court said Monday.
item.dc:creator: LINDSAY WHITEHURST and JAMIE STENGLE, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Exclusive poll shows tight races for NY-17 and NY-18 congressional seats
item.description: NEW YORK (PIX11) -- New exclusive PIX11 polling with Emerson College and The Hill reveals two incredibly close races and even a ballot controversy just four weeks from election day.
item.dc:creator: Henry Rosoff, PIX 11

item.title: Pro-Trump Christian nationalists are on tour to recruit election workers
item.description: “Are you guys ready to show the world that Christians will be silent no more?” said one speaker, whose nonprofit is recruiting people to become election workers.
item.dc:creator: Lisa Hagen and Audrey Nguyen, MPR News

item.title: Supreme Court won’t hear Pennsylvania legislators' challenge to executive actions expanding voting access
item.description: The Supreme Court decided Monday it won’t take up a case to restore a lawsuit by Pennsylvania Republicans that challenged executive actions expanding voting access on the basis that only state legislatures can regulate federal elections.
item.dc:creator: Ella Lee, Fox 5

item.title: NY-18 candidates Pat Ryan, Alison Esposito to face off in debate
item.description: NEW YORK (PIX11) – Democratic incumbent Rep. Pat Ryan and Republican challenger Alison Esposito will make their case for why they are the best fit to lead New York Congressional District 18 during a live debate Wednesday on PIX11 News.
item.dc:creator: Lauren Cook, PIX 11

item.title: New analysis suggests national debt could increase under Harris, but it would surge under Trump
item.description: No one is likely to be happy with the projected higher deficits laid out in a new analysis of Kamala Harris' and Donald Trump's economic plans.
item.dc:creator: JOSH BOAK, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Deputy Mayor for Public Safety Philip Banks resigns
item.description: NEW YORK (PIX11) – New York City Deputy Mayor for Public Safety Philip Banks III has resigned from his position, his spokespeople said on Monday. The resignation comes after sources said Friday that First Deputy Mayor Sheena Wright was also expected to resign.
item.dc:creator: Erin Pflaumer, PIX 11

item.title: It’s a close race for Michigan. These factors could decide it for Harris or Trump
item.description: Vice President Kamala Harris needs to win back Michigan voters President Joe Biden looked poised to lose. Donald Trump’s appeal remains strong here, but he’s not without his own struggles.
item.dc:creator: Majd Al-Waheidi, MPR News

item.title: This year’s Electoral College map may show another ‘blue shift.’ Here’s why
item.description: Differences in how quickly each state’s counties can report this year’s election results may lead to another “blue shift” or “red mirage” on the presidential electoral map.
item.dc:creator: Hansi Lo Wang, MPR News

item.title: Walz says he'll 'own up' when he misspeaks as the Democratic ticket steps up media interviews
item.description: The “Fox News Sunday” interview reflected a broader media blitz by presidential nominee Kamala Harris and Walz as the Democrats seek to garner public attention in the final 30 days of the campaign.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, MPR News

item.title: Harris, Walz to do several high-profile interviews this week
item.description: Harris' media stops this week will include 60 minutes, Howard Stern The View, the Call Her Daddy podcast and Univision.
item.dc:creator: Jackie Koppell, NewsNation

item.title: Trump returns to site of attempted assassination, honors shooting victims
item.description: Former President Donald Trump is returning Saturday to the site of his attempted assassination with a rally in Butler County.
item.dc:creator: Patty Coller, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Trump urges his supporters to deliver victory in his return to scene of first assassination attempt
item.description: BUTLER, Pa. (AP) — Donald Trump returned on Saturday to the Pennsylvania fairgrounds where he was nearly assassinated in July, urging a large crowd to deliver an Election Day victory that he tied to his survival of the shooting.
item.dc:creator: JULIE CARR SMYTH, JILL COLVIN and ADRIANA GOMEZ LICON, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Trump is returning to Butler, the site of the 1st assassination attempt against him
item.description: The rally will mark Trump's first time back in the Pennsylvania city since the failed assassination attempt against him in July. The guest list will include a shooting survivor, as well as Elon Musk.
item.dc:creator: Danielle Kurtzleben, MPR News

item.title: Ballots mailed out to registered voters for Presidential General Election
item.description: Registered voters in San Diego County will be receiving their ballots next week for the November Presidential General Election.
item.dc:creator: Domenick Candelieri, Fox 5

item.title: In Michigan, Harris doesn't get hoped-for firefighters endorsement amid shifting labor loyalties
item.description: REDFORD TOWNSHIP, Mich. (AP) — It was the perfect place to welcome the endorsement of the firefighters union — a gleaming new firehouse in a blue-collar town just outside of Detroit in the key battleground state of Michigan.
item.dc:creator: CHRIS MEGERIAN and WILL WEISSERT, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: NYC Councilman Joe Borelli on whether Mayor Eric Adams should resign
item.description: NEW YORK (PIX11) – New York City Mayor Eric Adams is facing mounting pressure following his indictment, with more federal corruption charges possible. Nearly 70% of New York City residents think Adams should resign, according to a Marist College poll released Friday.
item.dc:creator: Henry Rosoff, PIX 11

item.title: County official accuses two supervisors of preventing his promotion in filed claim
item.description: A former Registrar of Voters filed a claim against the county of San Diego, specifically making allegations against two sitting members on the Board of Supervisors.
item.dc:creator: Rhea Caoile, Fox 5
